_description: 引导剧情表 - 游戏中各事件触发的NPC对话

events.trigger: 进入游戏后的第一段对话（序章：Bun欢迎Mia来到枫叶小镇）

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: Alright, your new home is just ahead. Go take a look!
dialogues.text_cn: 好的，前面就是你在这里的新家了，去看看吧

dialogues.text_en: Mia is my old account, don't call me that anymore. My new account is called...
dialogues.text_cn: Mia是过气老号了，别叫了。我新号叫——

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: {player_name}! Got it! Then why don't you try the Fog & Brew cafe down the street first? But they speak English in there, can you handle it? 😏
dialogues.text_cn: {player_name}！记住了！那你先去街口 Fog & Brew 咖啡馆尝尝？不过里面说英语哦，你行吗？😏

dialogues.text_en: I'll go take a look right now. I hope you're an honest agent.
dialogues.text_cn: 我这就去看看，希望你是个有良心的中介

dialogues.speaker: mei
dialogues.text_en: Welcome to Fog & Brew! I'm Mei. You look like you could use a warm drink.
dialogues.text_cn: 欢迎来到Fog & Brew！我是Mei。你看起来需要一杯热饮。

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: Mei makes the best lattes in town! Let's learn how to order one.
dialogues.text_cn: Mei做的拿铁是镇上最好的！我们来学学怎么点单吧。

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: Look, Mia! Mirror Mart just opened its doors to us! Old Chen runs the place.
dialogues.text_cn: 看，Mia！镜湖超市向我们敞开了大门！老陈在这里经营。

dialogues.speaker: old_chen
dialogues.text_en: Ah, a new face! Welcome to Mirror Mart. Need help finding anything? I know every shelf in this store!
dialogues.text_cn: 啊，新面孔！欢迎来到镜湖超市。需要帮你找什么吗？这店里的每个货架我都了如指掌！

dialogues.speaker: mei
dialogues.text_en: The cafe is getting more popular thanks to you! I've added some new drinks to the menu.
dialogues.text_cn: 多亏了你，咖啡馆越来越受欢迎了！我在菜单上加了一些新饮品。

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: Nice work, Mia! Your English is really helping Maple Town come alive!
dialogues.text_cn: 干得好，Mia！你的英语真的让枫叶小镇变得更有活力了！

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: You did it, Mia! Your first coffee order was a success!
dialogues.text_cn: 你做到了，Mia！你的第一次咖啡点单成功了！

dialogues.speaker: mei
dialogues.text_en: Not bad at all! Here, take this coffee cup charm as a little gift from me.
dialogues.text_cn: 真不错！来，这个咖啡杯挂饰送给你，算是我的小礼物。

dialogues.speaker: bun
dialogues.text_en: Keep practicing and we'll explore more of Maple Town together!
dialogues.text_cn: 继续加油练习，我们一起探索更多枫叶小镇的地方！

dialogues.speaker: mei
dialogues.text_en: Oh, you placed the coffee cup charm! It looks perfect there.
dialogues.text_cn: 哦，你放了咖啡杯挂饰！放在那里看起来太合适了。

dialogues.speaker: mei
dialogues.text_en: That apron suits you! You're becoming a real barista, Mia!
dialogues.text_cn: 那件围裙很适合你！你正在成为一个真正的咖啡师，Mia！
